coach_notes: The gaps in classroom management, child development, and lesson planning are most critical because they are foundational for roles like teaching assistant or early childhood educator, which are common social-service career paths. Without these skills, you cannot effectively structure learning environments or support children's growth, which are core job requirements. To address this, pursue a short certification in early childhood education or volunteer in afterschool programs to gain hands-on experience with these competencies.

jobs.title: English and History tutor
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your tutoring experience, communication skills, and organized nature directly match this role. Spanish could be an asset for diverse students.
jobs.gaps: No explicit mention of English/history subject expertise; may need to highlight specific tutoring methods or curriculum knowledge.

jobs.gaps: Lack of specific health leadership or OMEF-related experience; need to demonstrate deeper understanding of health systems and program coordination.
